Elon Musk (xAI 创始人).text:
Universal HIGH INCOME via checks issued by the Federal government is the best way to deal with unemployment caused by AI. 

AI/robotics will produce goods & services far in excess of the increase in the money supply, so there will not be inflation.
Elon Musk (xAI 创始人).summary: 政府发放高收入支票应对AI失业，不致通胀

OpenAI (GPT、ChatGPT、DALL-E).text:
Codex for (almost) everything.

It can now use apps on your Mac, connect to more of your tools, create images, learn from previous actions, remember how you like to work, and take on ongoing and repeatable tasks.

Anthropic (Claude 模型).text:
Introducing Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable Opus model yet.

It handles long-running tasks with more rigor, follows instructions more precisely, and verifies its own outputs before reporting back.

You can hand off your hardest work with less supervision.
Anthropic (Claude 模型).summary: Anthropic发布新模型Claude Opus 4.7，功能升级。
key_data: 更精确的指令遵循，自我验证

Runway (AI 视频).text: Seedance 2.0 is now available in 1080p on Runway. More pixels, more detail, more reasons to zoom in.

You can now bring your Runway Characters to life with a script. Here's how:

1. Choose or create a Character
2. Type in your script
3. Click "Generate"

Try it today at the link below.
Runway (AI 视频).summary: Runway推出角色脚本生成功能。

Perplexity (AI 搜索引擎).text:
Today we're releasing Personal Computer.

Personal Computer integrates with the Perplexity Mac App for secure orchestration across your local files, native apps, and browser.

We’re rolling this out to all Perplexity Max subscribers and everyone on the waitlist starting today.
Perplexity (AI 搜索引擎).summary: 发布新功能，Perplexity Mac App升级

Perplexity (AI 搜索引擎).text:
Claude Opus 4.7 is now the default orchestration model powering Computer.

It's also available for Max subscribers on Perplexity web, iOS, and Android.
